form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 2 length second (34.64) over 600m at this track. Has claims if at her best.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked soon after start and lost ground.

form.formComment: Is back up to 600m which has been an issue in the past. Last appeared when fifth over 515m at Sandown five days ago. Rates among the chances this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Is back up to 600m which has been an issue in the past. Last appeared when fifth over 515m at Sandown five days ago. Rates among the chances this time.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 600m in 34.51 last start, beating Balding Sandy. Can make it back to back wins.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 600m in 34.51 last start, beating Balding Sandy. Can make it back to back wins.

form.formComment: He hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Has failed to show enough to come into contention here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: He hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Has failed to show enough to come into contention here.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 1.5 lengths over 600m at this track in a handy 34.64, beating Zap Devere. Expected to measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 1.5 lengths over 600m at this track in a handy 34.64, beating Zap Devere. Expected to measure up again.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time when third (34.69) at Sandown, making it two placings on end. Solid top-three prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time when third (34.69) at Sandown, making it two placings on end. Solid top-three prospects.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at Bendigo over 660m when well in the market then went for a spell of a week-and-a-half. Returned last start finished 3rd in a Restricted WIN H on April 8 over 600m at this track behind Espoir beaten 5.5 lengths (34.87). Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted turning out of front straight.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Sandown over 715m. Will need to improve to feature.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 600m at this track. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Lines up for a tough race today. Didn't finish last start. Two back was ordinary fifth over 600m at this track. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.
